intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC机制深化与版权边界重塑
intel_overview.summary_zh: 欧洲IP生态正经历结构性调整。统一专利法院（UPC）通过发布年报及上线PMAC调解系统，标志其从初创期迈向成熟运营，替代性争议解决成为新焦点。司法层面，欧盟法院在版权领域厘清封闭场景传播界限并支持出版者获酬权，同时在商标声誉评估上强化全局视角。行政端，EPO加速无纸化并整合AI审查，EUIPO推动IP融资与地理标志扩展。整体态势显示，维权策略需从单一诉讼转向“诉讼+调解”组合，且需高度关注各国对版权新规的落地转化。
top_signals: UPC PMAC调解与仲裁系统正式上线，SEP及专利纠纷解决路径多元化
欧盟法院裁定养老院内部转播不构向公众传播，限缩版权许可义务边界
EPO指南拟强制要求指明修改依据，并引用UPC判例，审查标准趋严
利摩日瓷器注册为首个欧盟手工业地理标志，GI保护范围实质性扩张
cross_currents: 司法与行政协同增强：EPO指南明确引用UPC判例，表明专利审查与司法裁判标准正在深度融合，减少法律不确定性。
版权价值再平衡：CJEU一方面限制封闭场景下的版权扩张（养老院案），另一方面支持在线内容付费（Meta案），体现对数字平台与传统设施的场景化区分监管。
IP资产金融化加速：EUIPO与EIF合作解锁IP融资，结合EPO强调早期专利评估助力融资，显示IP正从法律权利向核心金融资产转变。
implications: 在欧维权需增加ADR选项：利用UPC新上线的PMAC调解机制，可降低SEP及复杂专利纠纷的成本与时间，避免单一诉讼风险。
内容合规需场景化评估：涉及在欧洲提供视听或内容服务时，需严格区分“向公众传播”与“内部接收”场景，避免过度授权成本。
专利申请需强化程序合规：应对EPO拟实施的强制修改依据指明义务，需优化答复策略，确保修改基础清晰，避免因形式问题导致权利丧失。
watchlist: 2027年EPO指南修订中关于修改依据强制指明的具体执行细则
各成员国针对CJEU Meta案判决关于新闻出版者公平报酬的国内法转化进度

daily_report.headline_en: UPC Infringement Rulings and PMAC Launch
daily_report.executive_line: UPC裁定两起轮胎专利侵权并正式开放PMAC调解中心，英国同步更新软件专利审查指南及二手假货执法，欧英两地司法与行政动作密集。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP态势聚焦UPC体系成熟化：法院在轮胎案中确立展览扣押后的侵权认定标准，上诉庭细化创造性评估方法论；同时PMAC正式运营，为FRAND争议提供ADR新路径。英国方面，UKIPO跟进最高法院判例重构软件专利审查标准，并联合Vinted强化二手平台反假货治理。律所层面加速UPC诉讼能力建设，显示争议解决正向专业化、工具化演进。

storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 确立展览侵权裁判口径，形成诉讼与调解互补机制，提升法律确定性。

report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Finds Infringement of Two Motorcycle Tyre Patents After Exhibition Seizures
report_items.title: UPC finds infringement of two motorcycle tyres patents following international exhibition | EIP
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院就倍耐力起诉天津金宇集团和四川远星橡胶侵犯其EP2519412和EP3519207号专利作出判决。针对四川远星提出的无效反诉被驳回并认定侵权；天津金宇因未提交答辩状，法院作出缺席判决认定侵权。此前倍耐力已与部分共同被告达成和解。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Local Division in Milan ruled that Tianjin Kingtyre Group and Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber infringed Pirelli’s unitary patents EP2519412 and EP3519207. The actions followed seizure orders executed after the defendants exhibited allegedly infringing products at the 2024 EICMA motorcycle exhibition. The Court rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s counterclaim for revocation of EP3519207 and confirmed infringement. Conversely, Tianjin Kingtyre failed to file a statement of defence, resulting in a default judgment for infringement of EP2519412 under Rules 355.1(a) and 355.3 RoP. Prior to...
core_points_zh: 米兰地方法院驳回四川远星对EP3519207的无效反诉，认定其构成专利侵权
天津金宇未按规则提交答辩状，法院依据程序规则作出缺席判决，认定其侵犯EP2519412
诉讼起因于被告在2024年11月国际摩托车展览会上展示涉嫌侵权产品，此前已执行扣押令
core_points_en: UPC Milan rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s invalidity counterclaim and found infringement of Pirelli patent EP3519207.
Tianjin Kingtyre received a default judgment for infringing EP2519412 after failing to file a defence.
Infringement proceedings originated from seizure orders targeting products displayed at the November 2024 EICMA exhibition.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: These judgments illustrate the UPC’s procedural efficiency in handling exhibition-based evidence and default scenarios. Rights holders can leverage seizure orders from trade fairs to secure swift infringement findings when defendants do not engage. For practitioners, the cases highlight the critical importance of timely defensive filings to avoid default judgments and the high threshold for successfully challenging p...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Exhibiting products at major European trade fairs carries heightened litigation risk, as seizures can rapidly lead to final infringement judgments if defences ar…
Practice note: Default judgments under Rule 355 RoP provide a streamlined path for rights holders when defendants fail to participate, emphasizing the need for rigorous service an…
What to monitor: Observe how the UPC balances provisional measures obtained at exhibitions with subsequent main proceedings, particularly regarding the standard of proof required…

report_items.title: Beyond qualification: navigating life as a newly qualified Trade Mark Attorney
report_items.summary_zh: 英国特许商标律师协会（CITMA）发布文章及网络研讨会回顾，旨在指导新获得资格的商标律师适应职业生涯初期挑战。内容涵盖从理论学习到商业实践的转变，强调建立客户信任、提供具有商业背景的法律建议以及保持职业健康的重要性。
report_items.summary_en: The Chartered Institute of Trade Mark Attorneys (CITMA) publishes guidance addressing the professional transition for newly qualified trade mark attorneys. Drawing on a webinar with Barker Brettell practitioners, the resource highlights the shift from academic legal analysis to commercial advisory roles. It emphasizes that early-career professionals must move beyond identifying legal risks to providing context-aware business recommendations. Key themes include understanding client economic pressures, avoiding indecisive advice, and building trust through consistency and clarity. The guidance a...
core_points_zh: 新任律师需从单纯识别法律风险转向结合宏观微观经济压力提供商业决策支持
避免仅呈现选项而不给建议，应评估法律与商业局势以成为值得信赖的顾问
良好的客户关系建立在一致性、清晰度和诚实基础上，同时需注重个人福祉
core_points_en: New attorneys must shift from pure legal risk identification to providing commercially contextualized business decision support.
Practitioners should avoid presenting options without recommendations, instead offering clear steers based on legal and commercial assessments.
Effective client relationships rely on consistency, clarity, and honesty, alongside attention to professional wellbeing and networking.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文属于职业发展指导，强调商标律师在早期执业中需平衡法律严谨性与商业实用性。对于初级从业者而言，理解客户商业语境并提供明确导向性建议是提升专业地位的关键，而非仅停留在法律条文分析层面。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance underscores the expectation for trade mark attorneys to function as trusted commercial advisors rather than solely legal technicians. For firms and in-house teams, it highlights the importance of mentoring junior staff to deliver decisive, business-oriented counsel. Understanding the broader economic context of client instructions is presented as a critical competency for early-career development and lo...
insight_points_zh: 新执业律师需培养将法律分析转化为商业决策支持的复合能力
在提供法律咨询时，应避免中立旁观，需基于商业背景给出明确指引
持续观察行业对初级律师在客户关系管理与商业洞察力方面的具体要求
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clients increasingly expect attorneys to integrate legal analysis with commercial strategy, requiring advice that supports decisive business actions rather than…
Practice note: Junior practitioners should be trained to assess macro- and micro-economic factors affecting clients, ensuring recommendations are grounded in both legal validity a…
What to monitor: Observe how professional bodies like CITMA define evolving competency standards for newly qualified attorneys, particularly regarding commercial acumen and client…

report_items.title_en: PMAC Opens Alongside UPC: ADR Options for European Patent Disputes
report_items.title: PMAC Operating Alongside The UPC – Will The Combination Of Conventional Patent Litigation And Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) Form The New Gold Standard?
report_items.summary_zh: Mondaq 转载 Bardehle Pagenberg 文章称，统一专利法院框架下的专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）已于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放，地点设在卢布尔雅那和里斯本。文章介绍，PMAC 面向欧洲专利、单一效力专利、补充保护证书及相关争议提供调解和仲裁程序，并已通过仲裁规则和调解规则。文章认为，PMAC 可能在 FRAND 争议等场景中成为传统 UPC 诉讼之外的补充选择。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally opened on June 2, 2026, integrating into the Unified Patent Court framework. Based in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC offers mediation and arbitration for patent disputes under the UPCA. It adopted specific Arbitration and Mediation Rules in April 2026 and publishes a roster of qualified neutrals. The centre aims to provide efficient, confidential alternatives to litigation, particularly for FRAND disputes. Its jurisdiction covers unitary patents, SPCs, and related commercial disputes with a factual or legal nexus to UPC-competent matters...
core_points_zh: PMAC 于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放。
其规则基础来自 UPCA、UPC 程序规则以及 PMAC 的仲裁和调解规则。
PMAC 可覆盖欧洲专利、单一效力专利、SPC 及具有联系的相关争议。
core_points_en: PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework.
Jurisdiction includes unitary patents, SPCs, and related disputes with a factual or legal nexus.
New Arbitration and Mediation Rules were adopted in April 2026, alongside a published neutral roster.
report_items.insight_zh: PMAC 的启动使 UPC 体系从单纯法院诉讼扩展到更完整的争议解决组合。对 SEP/FRAND、跨境许可和商业关系仍需维持的专利争议而言，调解或仲裁可能提供更灵活、保密和可控的路径，但企业仍需评估可执行性、保全措施和与 UPC 未决诉讼的衔接。
report_items.insight_en: PMAC introduces a structured ADR pathway for rights holders seeking confidentiality and flexibility outside traditional litigation. This is particularly relevant for FRAND and licensing disputes where preserving commercial relationships is prioritized. Practitioners should evaluate PMAC’s procedural rules against ongoing UPC actions. Monitoring early case uptake will clarify how PMAC interacts with parallel court pro...
insight_points_zh: UPC 体系开始形成诉讼与 ADR 并行的制度结构。
FRAND 和许可争议可能是 PMAC 最值得关注的应用场景。
合同争议解决条款应考虑是否纳入 PMAC 路径。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.
Practice note: Review contract dispute clauses to consider incorporating PMAC mediation or arbitration mechanisms.
What to monitor: Early adoption rates and judicial treatment of PMAC outcomes in parallel UPC proceedings.

report_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院：重新审视创造性评估
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Emerging Methodology for Assessing Inventive Step
report_items.title: UPC: Rethinking inventive step - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: 随着统一专利法院诉讼加速，其上诉庭近期判决正塑造创造性评估标准。文章总结UPC新兴方法，指出其与欧洲专利局框架的差异，并探讨这些差异对专利撰写、审查及诉讼策略的影响。
report_items.summary_en: As litigation before the Unified Patent Court accelerates, recent Court of Appeal decisions are defining the assessment of core patentability issues, particularly inventive step. While this concept is familiar to practitioners, the UPC is developing a distinct methodology that differs from the European Patent Office framework. This analysis summarizes the emerging judicial approach, highlighting key divergences from EPO practice. It further considers how these differences may influence patent drafting, prosecution, and litigation strategies within the UPC system. Rights holders and counsel mus...
core_points_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭近期判决正在定义该平台核心可专利性问题的评估方式
创造性概念虽熟悉，但在统一专利法院受制于独特且不断发展的方法论
文章旨在总结UPC新兴方法，并highlight其与欧洲专利局框架的具体差异
core_points_en: UPC Court of Appeal decisions are shaping the specific assessment standards for inventive step in ongoing litigation.
The UPC is developing a distinct methodology for inventive step that diverges from established EPO frameworks.
These judicial differences impact patent drafting, prosecution strategies, and litigation approaches before the Unified Patent Court.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: Practitioners should note that UPC inventive step assessment is not identical to EPO examination practice. Recent appellate rulings indicate a developing judicial standard that requires adjusted argumentation strategies. Monitoring these precedents is essential for accurate validity forecasting and effective portfolio management in the unitary patent system.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Divergence from EPO practice means prior validity opinions may require reassessment for UPC enforcement or defense purposes.
Practice note: Litigation and prosecution teams must adapt technical arguments to align with the UPC’s emerging, distinct inventive step methodology.
What to monitor: Track subsequent Court of Appeal judgments to identify consistent patterns in how technical problems and solutions are evaluated.

report_items.title_en: UK IPO Launches Guidance to Help Consumers Identify Counterfeit Second-Hand Fashion
report_items.title: UK IPO launches new guidance to help consumers spot fakes
report_items.summary_zh: CITMA 报道称，英国知识产权局发布新指南，帮助消费者在网上购买二手时尚商品时识别假货。该指南由在线平台 Vinted 支持，属于 UKIPO “Second-hand, not second best” 宣传活动的一部分。报道引用 UKIPO 研究称，过去一年在线购买二手服装的人中，四分之一曾在不知情情况下买到假货，年轻消费者在二手平台遇到假冒设计师商品的比例更高。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has released new consumer guidance to identify counterfeit goods in the online second-hand fashion market. Developed with support from resale platform Vinted, this initiative supports the 'Second-hand, not second best' campaign addressing rising counterfeit prevalence. Recent UK IPO research indicates that one in four online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeits in the past year, with younger demographics disproportionately affected. The guidance advises consumers to verify seller profiles, scrutinize product imagery and descriptions...
core_points_zh: UKIPO 发布面向二手时尚网购的反假货消费者指南。
指南由 Vinted 支持，并纳入 UKIPO 新宣传活动。
UKIPO 研究显示二手平台假货风险正在影响消费者信任。
core_points_en: UK IPO and Vinted launched guidance to help consumers spot fakes in online second-hand fashion markets.
Research shows one in four recent online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeit items.
Guidance recommends checking seller profiles, reviewing photos, comparing labels, and using platform verification tools.
report_items.insight_zh: 该动态不是新法律规则，但对品牌执法和平台治理有现实意义。随着二手时尚市场扩大，权利人需要把 resale 平台监测、卖家画像、平台验证工具和消费者教育纳入反假货策略，而不是只依赖传统下架投诉。
report_items.insight_en: This initiative highlights the strategic shift toward consumer education and platform collaboration in anti-counterfeiting efforts. For rights holders, it underscores the necessity of integrating resale platforms into brand protection strategies beyond traditional takedown mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms implement verification tools and how consumers respond to these educational resources will be critical for as...
insight_points_zh: 二手平台已成为英国反假货执法和消费者教育的新重点。
品牌方应将 resale 平台纳入常规监测范围。
平台验证和买家保护工具会成为反假货治理的重要证据来源。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should align internal brand protection strategies with emerging consumer education initiatives on resale platforms.
Practice note: Effective anti-counterfeiting now requires monitoring secondary markets and leveraging platform-specific verification and buyer protection tools.
What to monitor: Track adoption rates of verification tools and consumer sentiment shifts regarding trust in second-hand fashion marketplaces.

report_items.title_zh: Kluwer：欧盟版权改革进入新阶段，委员会双重咨询勾勒未来议题
report_items.title_en: EU Copyright Reform Advances via Twin Commission Consultations on CDSM Review
report_items.title: Europe’s next copyright reform moves a step closer to reality: what can we tell from the twin Commission consultations?
report_items.summary_zh: Kluwer Copyright Blog 分析欧盟委员会围绕版权政策启动的两项咨询，认为这标志着欧盟未来版权改革进入新阶段。文章指出，虽然《数字单一市场版权指令》允许委员会不早于 2026 年 6 月才进行审查，但委员会已迅速启动相关程序。咨询材料显示，未来改革可能以“增强欧洲创造力和创新版权环境”的定向倡议形式推进，关注 AI、体育赛事盗版、表演者报酬和研究等议题。
report_items.summary_en: The European Commission has launched twin consultations to review the Copyright in the Digital Single Market Directive, moving promptly despite provisions allowing delay until June 2026. This initiative signals a new phase in EU copyright policy, aiming to address evolving production and usage patterns without adopting broad fair use principles. The process includes an implementation survey and a Call for Evidence targeting specific issues such as artificial intelligence, sports event piracy, performer remuneration, and research exceptions. While the consultations primarily gather information...
core_points_zh: 欧盟委员会启动两项版权相关咨询，开启 CDSM 指令后续审查进程。
潜在改革被描述为定向倡议，而非全面重写欧盟版权体系。
咨询议题包括 AI、体育赛事盗版、表演者报酬和研究使用。
core_points_en: Commission launches twin consultations to review CDSM Directive implementation and future reform needs.
Reform approach remains targeted, addressing AI, sports piracy, performer pay, and research issues.
Consultations prioritize data gathering, with clear legislative directions expected later this year or next.
report_items.insight_zh: 这条信号说明欧盟版权政策已从 AI 单点争议扩展到更广的制度校准。内容平台、权利人、研究机构和 AI 服务商都应关注咨询问题如何转化为立法文本，尤其是训练数据、授权透明度、体育转播保护和跨境报酬规则。
report_items.insight_en: Rights holders and technology companies should note the Commission’s preference for targeted amendments over comprehensive copyright overhaul. The inclusion of AI and sports piracy indicates priority areas for regulatory adjustment. Stakeholders must engage with the Call for Evidence to shape upcoming legislative proposals, particularly regarding data training and cross-border remuneration mechanisms.
insight_points_zh: 欧盟版权改革可能采取多议题、定向修补方式。
AI 与版权的关系仍是核心，但不是唯一政策对象。
企业应尽早准备咨询回应和政策影响评估。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies in AI, sports media, and content licensing face potential regulatory changes affecting data usage and revenue distribution models.
Practice note: Legal teams should prepare evidence-based responses to the Call for Evidence, focusing on practical impacts of current CDSM Directive provisions.
What to monitor: Track how consultation feedback influences the provisional ‘Directive enhancing the copyright environment’ and subsequent legislative drafts.

report_items.title_zh: GJE：Emotional Perception 案后 UKIPO 再发审查报告，英国软件专利性口径继续演化
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Issues New Examination Report Following Emotional Perception Supreme Court Decision
report_items.title: Emotional Perception – the story continues - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: GJE 文章称，UKIPO 在长期受到关注的 Emotional Perception 案中发布了最新审查报告。文章回顾，英国最高法院 2026 年 2 月的判决放弃了沿用约 20 年的 Aerotel 方法，并使英国对计算机程序排除可专利性的分析更接近 EPO 的“any hardware”路径。最新审查报告显示，该案在最高法院判决后仍会继续影响英国软件、AI 和计算机实现发明的审查实践。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued its latest examination report in the long-running Emotional Perception case. This development follows the UK Supreme Court’s February decision, which abandoned the twenty-year-old Aerotel approach for assessing computer program patentability exclusions. By discarding this precedent, the Court aligned the UK framework with the European Patent Office’s “any hardware” approach. The new report indicates how examiners are applying these revised standards to pending applications. This marks a significant shift in UK practice, moving away from establishe...
core_points_zh: UKIPO 在 Emotional Perception 案后发布新的审查报告。
英国最高法院此前放弃 Aerotel 方法，并向 EPO 的 any hardware 路径靠拢。
该案继续影响英国对软件和 AI 相关发明可专利性的判断。
core_points_en: UKIPO issued a new examination report in the Emotional Perception case following recent Supreme Court rulings.
The Supreme Court abandoned the Aerotel approach, aligning UK patentability tests with the EPO any hardware method.
The updated report demonstrates how examiners apply the new standards to computer-implemented inventions.
report_items.insight_zh: 这条动态对在英国和欧洲同步布局软件、AI 或计算机实现发明的申请人有直接参考价值。短期内，申请策略需要同时跟踪 UKIPO 审查报告、英国法院后续处理和 EPO 实务，以避免英国说明书与权利要求写法落后于新口径。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the practical implementation of the Supreme Court’s shift toward EPO-aligned patentability standards. Rights holders should note that UK examination practice now diverges significantly from historical precedents. Portfolio managers must ensure that claim drafting and technical contribution arguments reflect the “any hardware” test rather than the former Aerotel framework. Monitoring ongoing UKIPO...
insight_points_zh: 英国软件专利性测试正在经历实质性重构。
UKIPO 审查报告将影响申请撰写和审查答复策略。
跨英国和 EPO 的申请组合需要重新校准技术贡献表述。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: UK patentability assessment for software and AI now aligns with EPO standards, requiring updated portfolio strategies.
Practice note: Drafting and prosecution arguments must pivot from Aerotel precedents to the adopted any hardware approach.
What to monitor: Subsequent UKIPO examination reports and guidance to clarify the scope of the new patentability test.

report_items.title_zh: Dehns吸纳前Marks & Clerk合伙人扩充专利诉讼团队
report_items.title_en: Dehns hires former Marks & Clerk partner to expand patent litigation team
report_items.title: Dehns expands patent litigation practice with former Marks & Clerk partner
report_items.summary_zh: 英国律所Dehns宣布聘请Graham Burnett-Hall以加强其专利诉讼业务。Burnett-Hall此前在Shoosmiths工作两年，处理各类知识产权事务。他曾在统一专利法院（UPC）代理Brightwake诉BSN案，此前曾任职于Marks & Clerk。
report_items.summary_en: UK firm Dehns has appointed Graham Burnett-Hall to strengthen its patent litigation practice. Burnett-Hall joins from Shoosmiths, where he served for two years advising on transactional, commercial, and litigation IP matters. His recent experience includes acting for Brightwake against BSN in proceedings at the Unified Patent Court (UPC). Prior to his tenure at Shoosmiths, he was a partner at Marks & Clerk. This recruitment adds specific UPC litigation capability to Dehns’ existing portfolio of services, reflecting continued movement of experienced practitioners within the UK intellectual prop...
core_points_zh: Dehns律所聘请前Shoosmiths律师Graham Burnett-Hall扩充…
Burnett-Hall拥有UPC诉讼经验，曾代理Brightwake诉BSN案件
该律师此前曾在Marks & Clerk任职，具备交易、商业及诉讼综合IP顾问经验
core_points_en: Graham Burnett-Hall joins Dehns from Shoosmiths to bolster patent litigation capabilities.
He brings recent Unified Patent Court experience from representing Brightwake against BSN.
Previous tenure at Marks & Clerk adds depth to his commercial and transactional IP background.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This appointment highlights the ongoing demand for practitioners with direct Unified Patent Court experience among leading UK firms. For rights holders, it signals increased availability of specialized counsel for cross-border patent disputes. Firms are actively integrating lawyers with proven UPC track records to enhance their competitive positioning in the evolving European litigation landscape.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders gain access to additional counsel with verified Unified Patent Court litigation experience for potential enforcement or defense actions.
Practice note: UK firms continue to prioritize hiring partners with active UPC case history to substantiate their cross-border dispute resolution offerings.
What to monitor: Track subsequent case allocations involving Dehns at the UPC to assess the practical integration of this new litigation capacity.

report_items.title_zh: 生命科学争议：在不确定世界中应对因果关系与损害赔偿
report_items.title_en: Navigating Causation and Damages in UK Life Sciences Disputes
report_items.title: Life Sciences disputes: navigating causation and damages in an uncertain world
report_items.summary_zh: 作为2026年伦敦国际争议周的一部分，Bristows与Oxera举办研讨会，讨论生命科学争议中的因果关系、反事实情景及损害赔偿。专家指出，该领域研发高风险及监管复杂，使得假设情景评估极具挑战。确定相关反事实情景是争议难点，经济证据有助于评估初步禁令等场景下的定价与市场份额问题。
report_items.summary_en: During London International Disputes Week 2026, Bristows and Oxera discussed causation and damages in life sciences disputes. The panel highlighted challenges in assessing counterfactuals given the sector's high R&D risk and regulatory complexity. Determining the relevant counterfactual is critical when evaluating failed collaborations, supply disruptions, or competitor market entry. Economic evidence helps tribunals assess pricing, market share, and competitive behavior, particularly in preliminary injunction contexts. The discussion emphasized grounding analyses in contemporaneous documents...
core_points_zh: Bristows与Oxera在2026年伦敦国际争议周期间，联合举办关于生命科学争议中…
由于行业具有高风险研发和监管复杂性，法院需评估假设情景，确定相关反事实情景成为争议中最…
经济证据可辅助评估竞争情景，特别是在涉及初步禁令的争议中，定价、市场份额及竞争行为问题…
core_points_en: Assessing counterfactuals is challenging due to high R&D risk and regulatory complexity in life sciences.
Economic evidence aids evaluation of pricing and market share, especially in preliminary injunction disputes.
Clear narratives grounded in contemporaneous documents help link alleged breaches directly to claimed losses.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: For rights holders and defendants, robust economic modeling supported by contemporaneous records is vital for proving causation. Practitioners should ensure expert assumptions are transparent to assist tribunals in navigating uncertainty. Monitor how UK courts weigh competing counterfactual scenarios in high-stakes life sciences litigation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strong documentary evidence supports economic models when quantifying damages in complex life sciences disputes.
Practice note: Clearly articulating expert assumptions helps tribunals evaluate competing counterfactuals in high-uncertainty sectors.
What to monitor: Judicial approaches to weighing economic evidence and counterfactual scenarios in UK life sciences cases.

report_items.title_zh: Bristows 推出 UPC Case Tracker，帮助跟踪统一专利法院判例
report_items.title_en: Bristows Launches UPC Case Tracker for Monitoring Key Decisions
report_items.title: Just launched | Bristows UPC Case Tracker
report_items.summary_zh: Bristows 宣布上线新的 UPC Case Tracker，旨在帮助用户在统一专利法院判决数量快速增长的背景下，更便捷地检索和分析关键裁判。该工具支持按临时禁令、跨境管辖、创造性等议题筛选，并配有简明摘要、原始判决链接以及音频摘要等辅助内容。
report_items.summary_en: Bristows has launched a new UPC Case Tracker to assist users in navigating the rapidly growing volume of Unified Patent Court decisions since its June 2023 inception. The tool facilitates the identification and analysis of key rulings across diverse legal issues, including preliminary injunctions, cross-border jurisdiction, and inventive step. Featuring various filters and tags, it allows targeted exploration of relevant areas. Building on the firm’s weekly Irides global patent litigation update, the tracker provides concise, expert-written summaries with links to full judgments. Audio summari...
core_points_zh: Bristows 推出新的 UPC Case Tracker 工具。
该工具面向持续增长的 UPC 判例，提供检索、筛选和摘要功能。
覆盖主题包括临时禁令、跨境管辖和创造性等关键争议。
core_points_en: New tracker addresses rapid growth in UPC decisions since the court launched in June 2023.
Tool enables filtering by key issues such as preliminary injunctions, jurisdiction, and inventive step.
Features expert summaries, audio options, and links to judgments alongside broader UPC content.
report_items.insight_zh: 这不是司法裁判本身，但对欧洲专利从业者和企业法务具有实用价值。随着 UPC 判例快速累积，谁能更高效地结构化检索裁判趋势，谁就更容易在禁令、无效、证据和跨境救济问题上形成更快的策略判断。
report_items.insight_en: As UPC jurisprudence expands, structured monitoring tools become essential for efficient legal research. This tracker offers practitioners a centralized resource for tracking procedural and substantive trends. By providing curated summaries and audio formats, it supports quicker assimilation of case law developments. For in-house teams and external counsel, such tools help maintain awareness of evolving standards in...
insight_points_zh: UPC 判例数据库和二次整理工具正成为实务基础设施。
争议热点的标签化检索有助于缩短诉讼准备时间。
企业法务可将此类工具作为监测 UPC 风险与机会的轻量入口。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Centralized access to curated UPC summaries helps rights holders track legal trends affecting portfolio enforcement and defense strategies efficiently.
Practice note: Expert-written summaries and audio formats reduce time spent on initial case screening, allowing counsel to focus on high-impact precedents.
What to monitor: Watch for updates in tagging categories as the UPC docket grows, particularly regarding emerging hotspots in jurisdiction and injunction standards.

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC三周年：ADR启用与判例体系成型
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Turns Three: ADR Launch and Case Law Maturity
weekly_report.executive_line: UPC迎来三周年，PMAC争议解决中心正式开放，上诉庭在管辖权、证据规则及创造性评估上确立关键先例，欧洲专利诉讼进入“诉讼+ADR”双轨成熟期。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP焦点集中于统一专利法院（UPC）的制度化成熟。PMAC调解仲裁中心正式运营，为FRAND及许可纠纷提供新路径。上诉庭通过Fujifilm v Kodak等案澄清长臂管辖、跨境证据提交及创造性评估标准，杜塞尔多夫分院采纳海牙等同测试。同时，EPO强化AI审查应用，英国推进软件专利性重构及IP融资，显示欧洲IP生态正从规则建立转向精细化运作与商业价值转化。

report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Finds Infringement of Two Motorcycle Tyre Patents After Exhibition Seizures
report_items.title: UPC finds infringement of two motorcycle tyres patents following international exhibition | EIP
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院就倍耐力起诉天津金宇集团和四川远星橡胶侵犯其EP2519412和EP3519207号专利作出判决。针对四川远星提出的无效反诉被驳回并认定侵权；天津金宇因未提交答辩状，法院作出缺席判决认定侵权。此前倍耐力已与部分共同被告达成和解。
report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Local Division in Milan ruled that Tianjin Kingtyre Group and Sichuan Yuanxing Rubber infringed Pirelli’s unitary patents EP2519412 and EP3519207. The actions followed seizure orders executed after the defendants exhibited allegedly infringing products at the 2024 EICMA motorcycle exhibition. The Court rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s counterclaim for revocation of EP3519207 and confirmed infringement. Conversely, Tianjin Kingtyre failed to file a statement of defence, resulting in a default judgment for infringement of EP2519412 under Rules 355.1(a) and 355.3 RoP. Prior to...
core_points_zh: 米兰地方法院驳回四川远星对EP3519207的无效反诉，认定其构成专利侵权
天津金宇未按规则提交答辩状，法院依据程序规则作出缺席判决，认定其侵犯EP2519412
诉讼起因于被告在2024年11月国际摩托车展览会上展示涉嫌侵权产品，此前已执行扣押令
core_points_en: UPC Milan rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s invalidity counterclaim and found infringement of Pirelli patent EP3519207.
Tianjin Kingtyre received a default judgment for infringing EP2519412 after failing to file a defence.
Infringement proceedings originated from seizure orders targeting products displayed at the November 2024 EICMA exhibition.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: These judgments illustrate the UPC’s procedural efficiency in handling exhibition-based evidence and default scenarios. Rights holders can leverage seizure orders from trade fairs to secure swift infringement findings when defendants do not engage. For practitioners, the cases highlight the critical importance of timely defensive filings to avoid default judgments and the high threshold for successfully challenging p...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Exhibiting products at major European trade fairs carries heightened litigation risk, as seizures can rapidly lead to final infringement judgments if defences ar…
Practice note: Default judgments under Rule 355 RoP provide a streamlined path for rights holders when defendants fail to participate, emphasizing the need for rigorous service an…
What to monitor: Observe how the UPC balances provisional measures obtained at exhibitions with subsequent main proceedings, particularly regarding the standard of proof required…

report_items.title_zh: 超越资格认证：新任商标律师的执业导航
report_items.title_en: CITMA Guidance on Transitioning from Qualification to Practice for New Trade Mark Attorneys
report_items.title: Beyond qualification: navigating life as a newly qualified Trade Mark Attorney
report_items.summary_zh: 英国特许商标律师协会（CITMA）发布文章及网络研讨会回顾，旨在指导新获得资格的商标律师适应职业生涯初期挑战。内容涵盖从理论学习到商业实践的转变，强调建立客户信任、提供具有商业背景的法律建议以及保持职业健康的重要性。
report_items.summary_en: The Chartered Institute of Trade Mark Attorneys (CITMA) publishes guidance addressing the professional transition for newly qualified trade mark attorneys. Drawing on a webinar with Barker Brettell practitioners, the resource highlights the shift from academic legal analysis to commercial advisory roles. It emphasizes that early-career professionals must move beyond identifying legal risks to providing context-aware business recommendations. Key themes include understanding client economic pressures, avoiding indecisive advice, and building trust through consistency and clarity. The guidance a...
core_points_zh: 新任律师需从单纯识别法律风险转向结合宏观微观经济压力提供商业决策支持
避免仅呈现选项而不给建议，应评估法律与商业局势以成为值得信赖的顾问
良好的客户关系建立在一致性、清晰度和诚实基础上，同时需注重个人福祉
core_points_en: New attorneys must shift from pure legal risk identification to providing commercially contextualized business decision support.
Practitioners should avoid presenting options without recommendations, instead offering clear steers based on legal and commercial assessments.
Effective client relationships rely on consistency, clarity, and honesty, alongside attention to professional wellbeing and networking.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文属于职业发展指导，强调商标律师在早期执业中需平衡法律严谨性与商业实用性。对于初级从业者而言，理解客户商业语境并提供明确导向性建议是提升专业地位的关键，而非仅停留在法律条文分析层面。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance underscores the expectation for trade mark attorneys to function as trusted commercial advisors rather than solely legal technicians. For firms and in-house teams, it highlights the importance of mentoring junior staff to deliver decisive, business-oriented counsel. Understanding the broader economic context of client instructions is presented as a critical competency for early-career development and lo...
insight_points_zh: 新执业律师需培养将法律分析转化为商业决策支持的复合能力
在提供法律咨询时，应避免中立旁观，需基于商业背景给出明确指引
持续观察行业对初级律师在客户关系管理与商业洞察力方面的具体要求
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clients increasingly expect attorneys to integrate legal analysis with commercial strategy, requiring advice that supports decisive business actions rather than…
Practice note: Junior practitioners should be trained to assess macro- and micro-economic factors affecting clients, ensuring recommendations are grounded in both legal validity a…
What to monitor: Observe how professional bodies like CITMA define evolving competency standards for newly qualified attorneys, particularly regarding commercial acumen and client…

report_items.title_zh: Mondaq：UPC 专利调解与仲裁中心正式开放，或为 FRAND 和欧洲专利争议提供 ADR 路径
report_items.title_en: PMAC Opens Alongside UPC: ADR Options for European Patent Disputes
report_items.title: PMAC Operating Alongside The UPC – Will The Combination Of Conventional Patent Litigation And Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) Form The New Gold Standard?
report_items.summary_zh: Mondaq 转载 Bardehle Pagenberg 文章称，统一专利法院框架下的专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）已于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放，地点设在卢布尔雅那和里斯本。文章介绍，PMAC 面向欧洲专利、单一效力专利、补充保护证书及相关争议提供调解和仲裁程序，并已通过仲裁规则和调解规则。文章认为，PMAC 可能在 FRAND 争议等场景中成为传统 UPC 诉讼之外的补充选择。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally opened on June 2, 2026, integrating into the Unified Patent Court framework. Based in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC offers mediation and arbitration for patent disputes under the UPCA. It adopted specific Arbitration and Mediation Rules in April 2026 and publishes a roster of qualified neutrals. The centre aims to provide efficient, confidential alternatives to litigation, particularly for FRAND disputes. Its jurisdiction covers unitary patents, SPCs, and related commercial disputes with a factual or legal nexus to UPC-competent matters...
core_points_zh: PMAC 于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放。
其规则基础来自 UPCA、UPC 程序规则以及 PMAC 的仲裁和调解规则。
PMAC 可覆盖欧洲专利、单一效力专利、SPC 及具有联系的相关争议。
core_points_en: PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework.
Jurisdiction includes unitary patents, SPCs, and related disputes with a factual or legal nexus.
New Arbitration and Mediation Rules were adopted in April 2026, alongside a published neutral roster.
report_items.insight_zh: PMAC 的启动使 UPC 体系从单纯法院诉讼扩展到更完整的争议解决组合。对 SEP/FRAND、跨境许可和商业关系仍需维持的专利争议而言，调解或仲裁可能提供更灵活、保密和可控的路径，但企业仍需评估可执行性、保全措施和与 UPC 未决诉讼的衔接。
report_items.insight_en: PMAC introduces a structured ADR pathway for rights holders seeking confidentiality and flexibility outside traditional litigation. This is particularly relevant for FRAND and licensing disputes where preserving commercial relationships is prioritized. Practitioners should evaluate PMAC’s procedural rules against ongoing UPC actions. Monitoring early case uptake will clarify how PMAC interacts with parallel court pro...
insight_points_zh: UPC 体系开始形成诉讼与 ADR 并行的制度结构。
FRAND 和许可争议可能是 PMAC 最值得关注的应用场景。
合同争议解决条款应考虑是否纳入 PMAC 路径。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.
Practice note: Review contract dispute clauses to consider incorporating PMAC mediation or arbitration mechanisms.
What to monitor: Early adoption rates and judicial treatment of PMAC outcomes in parallel UPC proceedings.

report_items.title_zh: 海鲜及水产品领域专利趋势分析
report_items.title_en: Global Patent Trends in Seafood and Aquatic Food Products: Innovation and Competitive Dynamics
report_items.title: Patent Trends In Seafood And Aquatic Food Products
report_items.summary_zh: aera AS分析显示，全球海鲜专利申请量从2011年80件激增至2024年4024件。中国以超9000件申请居首。挪威企业在2020-2022年峰值后活动停滞，面临竞争脆弱性。关键技术包括循环水养殖、加工及高价值成分提取。文章强调挪威需加强IP战略以维持竞争力。
report_items.summary_en: A recent analysis by aera AS reveals a dramatic surge in global patent activity within the seafood and aquatic food sector. Applications rose from 80 in 2011 to 4,024 in 2024, with granted patents reaching 2,426. China dominates the landscape with over 9,000 cumulative applications, while Norwegian firms show stagnation post-2022. Key innovation areas include sustainable aquaculture systems like RAS, advanced processing techniques such as enzymatic hydrolysis, and high-value marine ingredients including omega-3s. The data underscores patenting as a critical tool for securing competitive advant...
core_points_zh: 全球海鲜专利申请量激增，2024年达4024件，中国以超9000件累计申请主导市场
挪威企业专利活动在2020-2022年峰值后停滞，面对国际竞争显得更为脆弱
增长驱动力包括可持续养殖系统、鱼类加工技术及高价值海洋成分开发
core_points_en: Global seafood patent applications surged from 80 in 2011 to 4,024 in 2024, reflecting intensified industry innovation.
China leads with over 9,000 cumulative applications, whereas Norwegian patent activity has stagnated following peak years.
Key growth areas include sustainable aquaculture systems, advanced fish processing, and high-value marine ingredient extraction.
report_items.insight_zh: 挪威作为主要海鲜出口国，其专利活动停滞可能削弱长期竞争优势。企业需关注将创新转化为IP资产，特别是在可持续技术和高价值产品领域。监控中国专利布局对欧洲市场准入的潜在影响，以及挪威行业是否调整IP策略以应对全球化竞争。
report_items.insight_en: For European rights holders, particularly in traditional seafood hubs like Norway, stagnating patent activity amid global growth signals strategic vulnerability. Companies must align IP portfolios with emerging technologies in sustainability and high-value processing to maintain market position. Monitoring dominant filers is essential for assessing freedom-to-operate risks and identifying licensing or collaboration o...
insight_points_zh: 挪威海鲜行业专利活动停滞，需警惕在国际竞争中因IP保护不足而处于劣势
可持续养殖与高价值成分提取是专利增长热点，反映行业向绿色和高附加值转型
需持续观察挪威企业及欧盟同行如何调整IP战略以应对中国主导的全球专利格局
insight_points_en: Client relevance: European companies in stagnant jurisdictions risk losing competitive edge if IP strategies do not match global innovation rates.
Practice note: Portfolio reviews should prioritize sustainable aquaculture and high-value ingredient technologies to secure long-term commercial advantages.
What to monitor: Track Chinese patent grants in processing and RAS technologies to assess potential barriers to European market entry or export.

report_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院：重新审视创造性评估
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Emerging Methodology for Assessing Inventive Step
report_items.title: UPC: Rethinking inventive step - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: 随着统一专利法院诉讼加速，其上诉庭近期判决正塑造创造性评估标准。文章总结UPC新兴方法，指出其与欧洲专利局框架的差异，并探讨这些差异对专利撰写、审查及诉讼策略的影响。
report_items.summary_en: As litigation before the Unified Patent Court accelerates, recent Court of Appeal decisions are defining the assessment of core patentability issues, particularly inventive step. While this concept is familiar to practitioners, the UPC is developing a distinct methodology that differs from the European Patent Office framework. This analysis summarizes the emerging judicial approach, highlighting key divergences from EPO practice. It further considers how these differences may influence patent drafting, prosecution, and litigation strategies within the UPC system. Rights holders and counsel mus...
core_points_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭近期判决正在定义该平台核心可专利性问题的评估方式
创造性概念虽熟悉，但在统一专利法院受制于独特且不断发展的方法论
文章旨在总结UPC新兴方法，并highlight其与欧洲专利局框架的具体差异
core_points_en: UPC Court of Appeal decisions are shaping the specific assessment standards for inventive step in ongoing litigation.
The UPC is developing a distinct methodology for inventive step that diverges from established EPO frameworks.
These judicial differences impact patent drafting, prosecution strategies, and litigation approaches before the Unified Patent Court.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: Practitioners should note that UPC inventive step assessment is not identical to EPO examination practice. Recent appellate rulings indicate a developing judicial standard that requires adjusted argumentation strategies. Monitoring these precedents is essential for accurate validity forecasting and effective portfolio management in the unitary patent system.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Divergence from EPO practice means prior validity opinions may require reassessment for UPC enforcement or defense purposes.
Practice note: Litigation and prosecution teams must adapt technical arguments to align with the UPC’s emerging, distinct inventive step methodology.
What to monitor: Track subsequent Court of Appeal judgments to identify consistent patterns in how technical problems and solutions are evaluated.

report_items.title_en: UK IPO Launches Guidance to Help Consumers Identify Counterfeit Second-Hand Fashion
report_items.title: UK IPO launches new guidance to help consumers spot fakes
report_items.summary_zh: CITMA 报道称，英国知识产权局发布新指南，帮助消费者在网上购买二手时尚商品时识别假货。该指南由在线平台 Vinted 支持，属于 UKIPO “Second-hand, not second best” 宣传活动的一部分。报道引用 UKIPO 研究称，过去一年在线购买二手服装的人中，四分之一曾在不知情情况下买到假货，年轻消费者在二手平台遇到假冒设计师商品的比例更高。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has released new consumer guidance to identify counterfeit goods in the online second-hand fashion market. Developed with support from resale platform Vinted, this initiative supports the 'Second-hand, not second best' campaign addressing rising counterfeit prevalence. Recent UK IPO research indicates that one in four online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeits in the past year, with younger demographics disproportionately affected. The guidance advises consumers to verify seller profiles, scrutinize product imagery and descriptions...
core_points_zh: UKIPO 发布面向二手时尚网购的反假货消费者指南。
指南由 Vinted 支持，并纳入 UKIPO 新宣传活动。
UKIPO 研究显示二手平台假货风险正在影响消费者信任。
core_points_en: UK IPO and Vinted launched guidance to help consumers spot fakes in online second-hand fashion markets.
Research shows one in four recent online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeit items.
Guidance recommends checking seller profiles, reviewing photos, comparing labels, and using platform verification tools.
report_items.insight_zh: 该动态不是新法律规则，但对品牌执法和平台治理有现实意义。随着二手时尚市场扩大，权利人需要把 resale 平台监测、卖家画像、平台验证工具和消费者教育纳入反假货策略，而不是只依赖传统下架投诉。
report_items.insight_en: This initiative highlights the strategic shift toward consumer education and platform collaboration in anti-counterfeiting efforts. For rights holders, it underscores the necessity of integrating resale platforms into brand protection strategies beyond traditional takedown mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms implement verification tools and how consumers respond to these educational resources will be critical for as...
insight_points_zh: 二手平台已成为英国反假货执法和消费者教育的新重点。
品牌方应将 resale 平台纳入常规监测范围。
平台验证和买家保护工具会成为反假货治理的重要证据来源。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should align internal brand protection strategies with emerging consumer education initiatives on resale platforms.
Practice note: Effective anti-counterfeiting now requires monitoring secondary markets and leveraging platform-specific verification and buyer protection tools.
What to monitor: Track adoption rates of verification tools and consumer sentiment shifts regarding trust in second-hand fashion marketplaces.

report_items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局加强人工智能在专利审查中的应用
report_items.title_en: EPO Strengthens AI Use in Patent Examination Under Strategic Plan 2028
report_items.title: [Blog] L’OEB renforce l’usage de l’IA dans l’examen des brevets
report_items.summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）在其2028年战略计划框架下，持续推进人工智能在现有技术检索和专利申请审查中的部署。EPO确认使用AI工具辅助审查员，旨在提高检索质量、加速案件处理并增强可专利性决定的一致性。该举措遵循“以人为本的AI”原则，强调AI仅作为决策辅助工具，不取代审查员，审查员仍对法律和技术分析承担最终责任，以确保在案件量增加和技术复杂化背景下维持高授权质量。
report_items.summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) is progressively deploying artificial intelligence tools within its prior art search and patent examination processes, aligned with its Strategic Plan 2028. The EPO confirms that these AI systems are designed to assist examiners by enhancing the quality of state-of-the-art searches, accelerating case processing, and improving consistency in patentability decisions. This initiative follows a human-centric approach, where AI serves strictly as a decision-support tool without replacing the examiner. The examiner retains full responsibility for the legal and techni...
core_points_zh: EPO在2028战略计划下推进AI用于现有技术检索及专利审查，以提升效率与一致性
采取“以人为本的AI”模式，AI仅作辅助，审查员保留对法律和技术分析的最终责任
目标不仅是程序效率，更在于应对申请量增长及技术复杂性，维持高水准的专利授权质量
core_points_en: EPO integrates AI tools into prior art searches and examination to boost quality and consistency.
Human-centric model ensures examiners retain final responsibility for all legal and technical analyses.
Strategic goal balances procedural efficiency with high grant standards amid growing application complexity.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类政策更新给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This development signals the structural integration of AI into the EPO examination framework, normalizing advanced search assistance. While efficiency may improve, the human-centric mandate ensures that traditional prosecution strategies remain relevant, as examiners maintain ultimate discretion. Rights holders should anticipate potentially broader or more precise prior art citations while recognizing that AI-generat...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Applicants may face more comprehensive prior art citations, requiring robust differentiation strategies in responses.
Practice note: Examiners retain final liability, meaning AI-assisted findings must still withstand standard legal and technical scrutiny.
What to monitor: Observe how AI tools impact examination timelines and the consistency of patentability assessments in complex technical fields.

report_items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院：未在一审提出的事实与论点通常不足以推翻诉讼费用担保裁定
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: New Arguments Insufficient to Overturn Security for Costs Order
report_items.title: CoA, May 26, 2026, Security For Costs, UPC_CoA_74/2026
report_items.summary_zh: 该文概述 UPC 上诉法院在 UPC_CoA_74/2026 案中的处理思路。根据文中摘要，上诉方虽提出多项理由质疑一审关于诉讼费用担保的裁定，但未能证明相关错误达到“明显错误”门槛；同时，未在一审提出的新事实、新论点以及其他程序中的材料，通常不足以支持该类酌情审查上诉。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal dismissed an appeal against a security for costs order in case UPC_CoA_74/2026. The claimant argued the first instance decision was incorrect but failed to demonstrate manifest error. The Court held that new arguments, including facts from separate proceedings and unraised litigation insurance possibilities, cannot establish manifest error if not presented at first instance. This ruling reinforces the high threshold for discretionary review of procedural orders under Rule 220.3 RoP, emphasizing that appellate review is limited to correcting clear mistakes based on the e...
core_points_zh: 案件涉及 UPC 上诉法院对诉讼费用担保裁定的酌情审查。
文中强调上诉方需要证明一审裁定存在明显错误。
未在一审提出的事实和论点一般不能在上诉中转化为明显错误。
core_points_en: Discretionary review requires demonstrating that the impugned order contains a manifest error.
New arguments or facts not raised at first instance cannot constitute a manifest error.
Materials from separate proceedings where defendants are not parties are excluded from review.
report_items.insight_zh: 这类程序性裁定虽然不直接触及专利有效性或侵权实体判断，但对诉讼资源配置和跨境维权可诉性影响很大。实务上，这一要点强化了当事人在 UPC 一审阶段完整提交财务、担保和程序性抗辩材料的必要性，否则后续纠偏空间会明显收窄。
report_items.insight_en: This decision clarifies the strict limits of appellate review for procedural orders at the UPC. Parties must present all relevant financial and procedural arguments during first instance proceedings. Relying on new evidence or arguments on appeal is unlikely to succeed, as the Court focuses solely on whether the initial decision was manifestly erroneous based on the submitted record.
insight_points_zh: UPC 对程序性上诉的门槛可能维持较高标准。
费用担保争议中的证据和论点应尽量在一审一次性铺开。
跨境专利诉讼当事人需更早评估成本暴露和担保安排。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Appeals against security for costs orders face a high barrier; success depends on proving manifest error in the original decision.
Practice note: Ensure all arguments regarding financial status, litigation insurance, and cost exposure are fully developed and submitted at the first instance level.
What to monitor: Future UPC Court of Appeal decisions to see if this strict approach to new evidence extends to other procedural challenges.

report_items.title_zh: UPC上诉率与案件分布：欧洲并非排行榜
report_items.title_en: UPC Appeal Rates and Case Distribution: Europe Is Not a League Table
report_items.title: UPC Appeal Rates and Case Distribution: Europe Is Not a League Table
report_items.summary_zh: 本文评论指出，不应将统一专利法院（UPC）视为计分板。尽管上诉统计数据能揭示法律澄清需求及程序压力点，但不能直接衡量各分庭判决质量或用于排名。高上诉率往往反映该分庭处理案件复杂度高或受用户信任，而非司法弱点。数据应用应侧重于理解法院运作，而非构建国家诉讼文化间的竞争叙事。
report_items.summary_en: This commentary argues that Unified Patent Court appeal statistics should not be used to rank division quality or frame national litigation cultures as competitors. While appeal rates offer valuable empirical data on procedural pressure points and legal clarification needs, they do not measure judicial performance. The debate has shifted from case concentration concerns to misinterpreting reversal rates as quality indicators. Properly analyzed, high appeal volumes reflect areas where the Court of Appeal is actively stabilizing standards for urgency, evidence, and claim construction, rather tha...
core_points_zh: 上诉率可揭示法律澄清需求及程序压力点，但不能直接衡量分庭判决质量
高上诉率通常反映案件复杂性或用户信任度，易被误读为司法弱点
利用数据进行法院排名具有误导性，应侧重于理解法院运作机制
core_points_en: Appeal statistics reveal procedural pressure points but cannot validly measure the quality of specific UPC divisions.
High appeal rates often indicate intense legal testing and clarification needs rather than first-instance judicial errors.
Using data to rank divisions misleads stakeholders and obscures the functional role of the Court of Appeal.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务中需理性看待UPC各分庭的上诉数据，避免将其简单等同于判决质量优劣。高上诉率可能源于案件疑难程度或当事人对特定分庭的策略性选择。建议持续监控上诉法院对紧急性、证据规则等标准的澄清动态，以理解法律适用趋势，而非仅关注反转率排名。
report_items.insight_en: Practitioners should interpret UPC appeal data as a map of evolving legal standards rather than a performance metric. High reversal or appeal rates in specific divisions likely signal complex subject matter or unsettled procedural questions, not systemic failure. Strategic portfolio management requires understanding these dynamics to anticipate how the Court of Appeal structures new precedents.
insight_points_zh: 理性解读UPC上诉数据，避免将高上诉率简单等同于低判决质量
关注上诉法院在紧急性、证据及权利要求解释等方面的标准澄清动态
观察案件分布背后的用户选择逻辑及程序信心，而非仅看统计排名
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid interpreting high appeal rates at specific divisions as negative quality signals; they often reflect case complexity and active legal development.
Practice note: Use appeal data to identify where the Court of Appeal is clarifying standards for urgency, evidence, confidentiality, and claim construction.
What to monitor: Track shifts in case distribution and appeal outcomes to understand procedural confidence and the stabilization of first-instance practices.

report_items.title_zh: Grünecker发布UPC三周年精选判例白皮书，聚焦程序与实体规则成形
report_items.title_en: Grünecker White Paper: Selected UPC Decisions from the Court’s Third Year
report_items.title: Three Years of the UPC: Selected Decisions from the Third Year of the Unified Patent Court | Grünecker
report_items.summary_zh: Grünecker 在 UPC 运行满三周年之际发布白皮书，梳理第三年若干代表性裁判并评估其实务影响。其介绍称，随着案件数量持续增长，UPC 判例对欧洲专利诉讼实践的重要性正进一步提升，白皮书重点覆盖临时措施、证据保全以及程序和实体法律原则如何逐步成形。
report_items.summary_en: Grünecker has released a white paper analyzing selected decisions from the third year of the Unified Patent Court (UPC). The publication highlights that case filings continue to increase, underscoring the growing importance of UPC case law for European patent practice. Authored by the firm’s patent litigation experts, the analysis assesses the practical implications of recent rulings. Key topics covered include provisional measures and the preservation of evidence. The white paper aims to demonstrate how procedural and substantive legal principles are rapidly evolving and taking shape within t...
core_points_zh: Grünecker 发布 UPC 第三年精选判例白皮书，总结法院最新发展。
材料强调 UPC 立案量持续增长，判例正快速塑造欧洲专利诉讼实践。
关注点包括临时措施、证据保全及多项程序和实体规则的演进。
core_points_en: Case filings at the Unified Patent Court continue to rise, increasing the relevance of its case law.
The white paper analyzes selected third-year decisions to assess their practical implications for patent practice.
Key coverage includes evolving standards for provisional measures and the preservation of evidence.
report_items.insight_zh: 虽然这是一篇带有律所传播属性的白皮书引介，但其可发布价值在于反映市场已把 UPC 判例演进视为需要系统整理的独立知识产品。对企业和代理团队来说，信号很明确: UPC 已从“新法院观察期”进入“规则积累期”，需要把判例跟踪纳入常态化欧洲专利争议管理。
report_items.insight_en: This publication signals that the UPC is transitioning into a phase of established rule accumulation. For European and US stakeholders, systematic tracking of these emerging precedents is becoming essential for effective portfolio management and litigation preparedness, particularly regarding interim relief mechanisms.
insight_points_zh: UPC 已进入需要系统性判例复盘的阶段。
临时措施和证据保全仍是诉讼策略中最活跃的规则生成领域。
企业应把 UPC 判例更新纳入欧洲专利风险监测常规流程。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rising caseloads mean UPC precedents increasingly influence European patent enforcement and defense strategies.
Practice note: Recent decisions clarify procedural and substantive principles, particularly concerning provisional measures and evidence preservation.
What to monitor: Ongoing evolution of UPC case law as legal principles solidify during the court’s maturation phase.

transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年6月7日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，米兰地方法院驳回四川远星对EP3519207的无效反诉，认定其构成专利侵权。后续要看欧洲层面类似案件的裁判尺度和程序口径会不会继续收紧。
再看第二条，新任律师需从单纯识别法律风险转向结合宏观微观经济压力提供商业决策支持。值得关注的是，新执业律师需培养将法律分析转化为商业决策支持的复合能力。
再看第三条，PMAC 于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放。值得关注的是，UPC 体系开始形成诉讼与 ADR 并行的制度结构。
最后看第四条，统一专利法院上诉庭近期判决正在定义该平台核心可专利性问题的评估方式。后续要看欧洲层面会不会出现进一步官方动作或配套安排。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕SEP标准必要专利、商标、专利展开，接下来值得继续关注UPC创造性评估方法论的后续判例演变。
transcript_lines_en: Today is June 7, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.

First, UPC Milan rejected Sichuan Yuanxing’s invalidity counterclaim and found infringement of Pirelli patent EP3519207. Why it matters: Exhibiting products at major European trade fairs carries heightened litigation risk, as seizures can rapidly lead to final infringemen.

Next, New attorneys must shift from pure legal risk identification to providing commercially contextualized business decision. Why it matters: Clients increasingly expect attorneys to integrate legal analysis with commercial strategy, requiring advice that supports decisive bus.

Next, PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework. Why it matters: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.

Finally, UPC Court of Appeal decisions are shaping the specific assessment standards for inventive step in ongoing litigation. Why it matters: Divergence from EPO practice means prior validity opinions may require reassessment for UPC enforcement or defense purposes.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on SEPs, Trade marks, Patents. The next point to watch is Further court orders, institutional guidance and specialist commentary on the same issues.

topics.headline_en: UPC Tightens Evidence Standards as Mediation Center Launches
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）案件量持续增长，中国跃居EPO申请来源国前三。UPC通过米兰、赫尔辛基等分院判决确立严格证据披露及权利要求解释标准，同时专利调解仲裁中心（PMAC）正式运营。中国企业需适应“诉讼+ADR”双轨制，警惕程序违规风险，优化欧洲专利布局与维权策略。
key_points: 中国首次跻身EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利 uptake 率达28.7%，显示中欧专利互动深化。
UPC判例明确审查档案可限制权利要求范围，严格执行证据前置披露，迟交证据易被排除。
PMAC调解仲裁系统上线，为SEP/FRAND纠纷提供替代性解决路径，形成诉讼与ADR并行格局。
actions: 复盘在欧专利审查历史陈述，确保授权阶段主张与诉讼策略一致，避免自认限制保护范围。
建立UPC程序合规清单，严格遵守证据披露时限，避免因程序瑕疵导致关键证据失效或败诉。
评估PMAC调解机制适用性，针对SEP或许可争议提前制定ADR预案，以降低跨国维权成本。
watchlist: UPC上诉法院关于管辖权范围提请欧盟法院裁决的后续结果。
EPO 2027年指南修订中关于修改依据强制指明义务的具体落地细则。
杜塞尔多夫等热门分院新增合议庭后的判例倾向及案件分流效果。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) saw continued caseload growth alongside China’s emergence as a top-three source of European Patent Office applications. The Unitary Patent uptake rate reached 28.7%, reflecting deeper integration across Europe. Recent judgments from divisions in Milan and Helsinki have established stricter standards for evidence disclosure and claim interpretation, emphasizing that prosecution history can limit claim scope. Concurrently, the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) officially commenced operations, offering a formal alternative dispute resolution pathway. This development creates a dual-track environment combining litigation with structured mediation, particularly for SEP and FRAND disputes. Stakeholders must adapt to these procedural shifts by ensuring strict compliance with disclosure deadlines and aligning litigation strat...
key_points_en: China ranked among the top three EPO application sources, while Unitary Patent uptake hit 28.7%, signaling intensified European patent engagement.
UPC precedents now strictly enforce pre-trial evidence disclosure and allow prosecution history to restrict claim scope, increasing exclusion risks for late submissions.
The operational launch of PMAC provides a structured ADR framework for SEP and licensing disputes, establishing a parallel track to traditional litigation.
actions_en: Audit European prosecution histories to ensure consistency between grant-phase arguments and current litigation positions, preventing unintended claim scope limitations.
Implement strict UPC procedural compliance checklists to meet evidence disclosure deadlines, avoiding the exclusion of critical documents due to procedural defaults.
Evaluate PMAC mediation suitability for SEP or licensing conflicts, developing preemptive ADR strategies to reduce cross-border enforcement costs and timelines.
watchlist_en: Outcomes of pending referrals to the Court of Justice of the European Union regarding UPC jurisdictional scope.
Specific implementation details in the EPO 2027 Guidelines concerning mandatory indication of amendment bases.
Case allocation trends and jurisprudential developments following the expansion of judicial panels at the Düsseldorf Local Division.

topics.headline_zh: UPC重塑SEP格局：费率裁定与禁令风险
topics.headline_en: UPC Reshapes SEP Landscape: FRAND Rates and Injunction Risks
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）在SEP领域表现活跃，曼海姆分院打破传统尝试裁定FRAND费率，并频繁签发针对中国企业的反诉禁令。英国法院同步推进全球费率判决，中英司法冲突加剧。PMAC调解中心启用提供新解纷路径。欧盟TTBER修订强化合规要求，中国企业面临诉讼策略调整与许可谈判双重压力。
key_points: UPC司法激进：曼海姆分院倾向直接裁定FRAND费率，并针对中国临时许可申请签发反诉禁令，限制企业平行诉讼策略。
中英管辖冲突：英国高院作出全球FRAND判决，与中国法院裁决形成竞争，导致同一案件出现相互冲突的全球费率认定。
合规与替代机制：欧盟新版TTBER生效强化反垄断合规；UPC配套PMAC调解中心开放，鼓励通过ADR解决争议以降低诉讼成本。
actions: 审查许可协议中关于UPC管辖退出权及决策归属条款，避免因地权属不清陷入被动。
建立SEP侵权预警机制，收到通知须立即书面表达许可意愿，以保留FRAND抗辩权。
重新评估全球许可策略，关注英国与UPC费率差异，利用PMAC调解机制寻求非诉解决方案。
watchlist: 英国最高法院对专利池FRAND义务及全球费率管辖权的最终裁定动向。
UPC上诉法院关于长臂管辖界限及反诉禁令适用标准的后续判例发展。
欧盟委员会针对汽车及物联网领域SEP许可谈判组的反垄断执法口径变化。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) actively reshaped the Standard-Essential Patent (SEP) landscape. The Mannheim Local Division signaled a shift by considering direct FRAND rate determinations and issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign interim licenses, particularly affecting Chinese entities. Concurrently, divergent global rate rulings from UK courts intensified jurisdictional conflicts. The launch of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) in June 2026 introduced a new alternative dispute resolution path within the UPC framework. Additionally, updated EU competition guidelines heightened compliance obligations. These developments compel implementers and rights holders to adjust litigation strategies, manage conflicting judicial mandates, and leverage emerging mediation mechanisms to mitigate enforcement risks and optimize licensing outcomes...
key_points_en: The UPC Mannheim Local Division is moving toward direct FRAND rate determinations and issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions, restricting parallel litigation tactics and increasing enf...
Conflicting global FRAND rate judgments from UK courts and Chinese tribunals create legal uncertainty, requiring stakeholders to navigate complex cross-border jurisdictional overla...
The operational launch of the PMAC and stricter EU competition compliance standards offer new alternative dispute resolution avenues while demanding rigorous adherence to antitrust...
actions_en: Review existing license agreements to clarify opt-out rights and decision-making authority for UPC jurisdiction, preventing procedural vulnerabilities during validity challenges or...
Establish robust SEP infringement monitoring systems and ensure prompt written expressions of licensing willingness upon notice receipt to preserve FRAND defenses and mitigate inju...
Reassess global licensing strategies by analyzing rate disparities between UK and UPC precedents, while actively considering PMAC mediation to achieve cost-effective, non-litigious...
watchlist_en: Final rulings from the UK Supreme Court regarding patent pool FRAND obligations and the scope of global rate-setting jurisdiction.
UPC Court of Appeal precedents defining the limits of long-arm jurisdiction and the specific criteria for granting anti-anti-suit injunctions.
Evolution of European Commission antitrust enforcement policies concerning SEP licensing negotiations, particularly within the automotive and Internet of Things sectors.

topics.headline_zh: EUIPO强化执法与权利边界重塑
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Tightens Enforcement, Clarifies Post-Brexit Rights, and Expands Design Tools
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，EUIPO联合欧盟委员会及Eurojust升级打击网络假冒与有组织犯罪，推出IPEP数字执法工具。司法层面明确脱欧后英国未注册商标失效，并收紧名人姓名注册标准。此外，手工艺品地理标志新制度进入过渡期，DesignView成为全球最大外观搜索库，企业需关注合规与资产数字化。
key_points: 执法升级：EUIPO联手EC及Eurojust深化跨境打假，部署IPEP数字工具实时同步侵权信息。
确权收紧：法院裁定脱欧后纯英国未注册商标不得异议欧盟商标；名人姓名注册因缺乏显著性被拒。
制度扩容：手工艺品地理标志（CIGI）进入国家向欧盟制度过渡期；DesignView成全球最大外观图库。
actions: 排查英国权利：复核依赖英国未注册商标阻碍欧盟申请的策略，确保在欧盟境内有独立有效权利基础。
利用资助工具：申请EUIPO中小企业基金（SME Fund）补贴商标/外观费用，利用DesignView进行全球近似检索。
布局新领域：涉及手工艺或工业特色产品的企业，需在2026年底前完成从国家保护向欧盟CIGI制度的过渡申请。
watchlist: 名人姓名商标审查标准的进一步司法细化及例外情形。
欧盟手工艺品地理标志（CIGI）具体审查指南及异议实践。
IPEP数字执法平台对跨境电商平台通知-删除机制的实际影响。
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the EUIPO intensified cross-border enforcement against organized crime through the IP Enforcement Portal (IPEP) and joint operations with Europol. Judicially, the Court of Justice confirmed that UK unregistered rights cannot support EU trademark oppositions decided after the Brexit transition period, necessitating independent EU rights bases. Concurrently, the new EU framework for Craft and Industrial Geographical Indications (CIGI) entered its transitional phase, requiring national rights holders to adapt by late 2026. In design practice, DesignView became the world’s largest image search engine following global office integration. These developments underscore the need for strategic portfolio reviews, particularly regarding UK-EU alignment, CIGI conversion deadlines, and leveraging digital tools for clearance and enforcement.
key_points_en: Enforcement upgrades: EUIPO deployed IPEP digital tools and supported multi-agency operations like SHIELD VI to combat online counterfeiting and organized crime.
Rights clarification: CJEU ruled that post-transition UK unregistered rights cannot block EU trademark applications, tightening opposition strategies.
System expansion: The CIGI regime enters its final transition year, while DesignView achieves global scale as the largest design image search database.
actions_en: Audit UK-EU rights: Verify that EU trademark portfolios rely on valid EU-based earlier rights, not solely on pre-Brexit UK unregistered marks.
Plan CIGI transitions: Assess eligibility for Craft and Industrial Geographical Indications and file necessary conversions before the December 2026 deadline.
Leverage digital tools: Utilize DesignView for comprehensive global prior art searches and access EUIPO SME funds for cost-effective IP protection.
watchlist_en: Judicial refinement of reputation assessments in invalidity proceedings, as seen in recent General Court annulments.
Implementation guidelines and examination practices for the new EU Craft and Industrial Geographical Indications system.
Operational impact of IPEP on customs detention procedures and online platform notice-and-takedown mechanisms.

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化IP犯罪协同执法
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Intensify Cross-Border Enforcement Against IP Crime
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟与英国显著升级假冒打击力度。EUIPO联合欧盟委员会聚焦网络侵权，并深化与Eurojust及EMPACT的跨机构协作。英国UKIPO获资金延至2029年并拟扩编，重点监控二手平台及高风险耗材。执法呈现刑事化、跨境协同及全渠道覆盖趋势，中企需警惕供应链合规风险。
key_points: 欧盟层面：EUIPO联手欧盟委员会打击网络假冒，并通过EMPACT框架强化与Eurojust等机构的跨境刑事司法协作。
英国动态：UKIPO确认IP犯罪部门资金延至2029年并计划扩编，执法重心延伸至Vinted等二手交易平台及耗材领域。
执法趋势：行动聚焦有组织犯罪关联的高风险品类（如药品、碳粉），强调公众沟通与消费者教育，执法颗粒度更细。
actions: 建立出口产品全流程溯源体系，确保供应链合规，防范被卷入假冒或有组织犯罪指控。
将Resale（二手）平台纳入品牌日常监测范围，针对英国市场制定专门的防伪与下架策略。
加强在线渠道管控，配合欧盟网络打假行动，提前排查电商平台侵权链接，降低刑事风险。
watchlist: 欧盟后续针对网络假冒及EMPACT框架下的具体配套执法指引与优先事项变化。
英国UKIPO IP犯罪部门扩编的具体时间表、职能范围调整及2029年前的实际查处数据。
二手交易平台在反假货指南发布后的合规义务履行情况及品牌方维权通道效率。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union and the United Kingdom significantly escalated enforcement actions against intellectual property crime. The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) strengthened collaboration with the European Commission, Eurojust, and Europol under the EMPACT framework to target online counterfeiting and organized criminal networks. Concurrently, the UK Intellectual Property Office secured funding for its specialist IP Crime Unit through 2029, with plans for operational expansion. Enforcement priorities now explicitly include high-risk consumables, such as printer toner, and secondary markets, notably online resale platforms for fashion. This shift toward criminalization and cross-border coordination requires rights holders to enhance supply chain due diligence and adapt monitoring strategies to cover digital resale channels and complex distr...
key_points_en: EU institutions, including EUIPO and Eurojust, are deepening cross-border judicial and law enforcement cooperation under the EMPACT framework to dismantle organized IP crime networ...
The UK IPO has extended funding for its IP Crime Unit until 2029 and is expanding focus to include secondary marketplaces like Vinted and high-risk consumables.
Enforcement actions increasingly target high-volume counterfeit categories such as pharmaceuticals and printer cartridges, emphasizing consumer education and coordinated multi-agen...
actions_en: Implement rigorous end-to-end supply chain traceability to ensure compliance and mitigate risks of involvement in organized counterfeit operations.
Integrate secondary resale platforms into brand protection monitoring programs and develop specific takedown strategies for the UK and EU markets.
Proactively audit online sales channels for infringing listings to align with EU digital enforcement initiatives and reduce exposure to criminal liability.
watchlist_en: Emerging enforcement guidelines and priority shifts under the EU EMPACT framework and related digital counterfeiting initiatives.
Operational expansion details, timeline, and enforcement metrics of the UK IPO IP Crime Unit leading up to 2029.
Compliance developments on second-hand trading platforms and the efficacy of new brand enforcement channels following recent consumer guidance releases.
